vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn toàn cảnh vô song/không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: The observation deck offers an unrivaled panoramic view of the city skyline, which I always try to capture.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng điện ảnh (đẹp như phim)
vocab.example: The dramatic lighting during a storm gives the landscape a cinematic quality that looks amazing in photos.

vocab.meaning: địa hình hiểm trở, gồ ghề
vocab.example: I find the rugged terrain of the northern highlands particularly photogenic due to its raw and wild nature.
Taking photos of a city at dusk requires a good tripod to handle the low-light conditions effectively.
The calm lake provided a serene backdrop for my portraits during our last camping trip.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: I view these photographs as visual mementos that allow me to relive my travels whenever I want.
The rolling hills of the countryside create a rhythmic pattern that is very pleasing to the eye in a photograph.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát thuận lợi (vị trí đẹp)
vocab.example: From this particular vantage point, you can see the river winding through the forest perfectly.
Photography is about catching a fleeting moment, like a double rainbow, before it disappears forever.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: I spend quite a bit of time on post-processing to enhance the natural colors of the sunsets I photograph.
